title: Windows Titlebar Delete
description: A mod that hides the Windows titlebar. You can use this to maximize the game and make the window appear as if it's in fullscreen without entering fullscreen mode (borderless window mode).
body:
A mod that hides the Windows titlebar. You can use this to maximize the game and make the window appear as if it's in fullscreen without entering fullscreen mode (borderless window mode).

- You can use `Windows + Up` key to maximize the game window
- Works only on Windows
